TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-hunter-becominig-a-bird_Hanaivaz

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.TRANSL: 你好。
Nice to see you.

S.FORM: a na pali‘uni saikin mas itu habas ang tu mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.TRANSL: 我要談論很久以前的故事.
I am going to tell an ancient story.

S.FORM: mapuasu tu bunun hai min‘uni mas hazam tupaun tu Duut tu hazam.
S.TRANSL: 帶狗狩獵的獵人變成一隻叫做Duut的鳥。
The hunter who hunted with a dog became a bird named Dut.

S.FORM: masa habas ang aiza dau a mamananu tu mamangan mais hanup.
S.TRANSL: 很久以前，說是有一個很厲害的專業獵人。
Long time a ago, there was a greatly brave hunter.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian saia madas mas isaicia tu asu.
S.TRANSL: 有一天，他帶著他的狗。
One day, he was with his dog.

S.FORM: aupa mais mapuasu hai asa tu aiza maz a mamangan a maz a sia asu a mindangaz mas bunun cia masinap mas ai takilibus tu minihumis.
S.TRANSL: 是因為狩獵的時候必須有很厲害的狗幫人追逐野生動物。
It is because when hunting with a dog, a brave dog is required to help hunters chase the game.

S.FORM: at aiza maz a mamangan tu bunun saia hai mais muskun mas bunun mapuasu hai nii tu palavaiun mas duma tu bunun.
S.TRANSL: 有一個很勇敢的人，他和其他人一起帶狗狩獵的時候，絕對不輸別人
There was a brave man who was never left behind when going dog-hunting with others.

S.FORM: mais manah hai mastaan isaicia pinanah supahdaingaz.
S.TRANSL: 打獵時，他獵得最多。
When hunting, he caught preys the most.

S.FORM: upanahan mas cici tu supahdaingaz aupa mamananu tu mahansiap.
S.TRANSL: 他可以獵得比較多因為他很會。
He was able to get more game because he was excellent.

S.FORM: eh hanup at aizaan mas asu tu kadimanun saicia tu asu tu ma’muav tu mamananu mahansiap masinap masinap mas ngabul masinap mas babu hanvang.
S.TRANSL: 他有一隻非常地會獵補愛的愛狗，獵水鹿，獵山豬。
He has a treasured dog that is pretty good at chasing, chasing deers and pigs.

S.FORM: masmuav tu supah dangaz in a pinanah a cici at.
S.TRANSL: 獵過非常多的獵物了。
So much game is shot.

S.FORM: kakankanun in saicia tu na mudaan in kulumah.
S.TRANSL: 他一直（把獵物）裝（進網袋）了，要回家了。
He kept packing the game and was ready to go home.

S.FORM: ung hai mikui maz a isaicia asu hai manadidiip tu uskatasipal lulunglung at haiap saia tu maz a asu hai masinap ang mas vanis daingaz ua macimananu lulunglung.
S.TRANSL: 可是因為他的狗反而愈來愈追到對岸，一直汪汪叫，他知道這隻狗還正在追大山豬呢，因為他還一直在用力的叫。
However since his dog kept barking while approaching the other side, he knew that the dog was chasing a big wild boar because it barked without stopping.

S.FORM: ung at taudadanivan saicia tu eh tutut tutututut tutut musuhaisa.
S.TRANSL: 然後，獵人一直「嘟嘟嘟」地叫狗回來。
Then, ‘Tu tu tu tu tu tu,’ the hunter called the dog back.

S.FORM: masasaa maz a Talum mamangan a cis‘ama mas davaz mudaan kulumah at.
S.TRANSL: Talum就不管了，背起網袋走回家了
Talum let it go, taking the net bag on his back and left for home.

S.FORM: ansasu malala’la taudadaniv mas asu cia tu dai dai mudaan in kulumah hai nii tu haiap tu taunalumah in a maz a Talum mamangan at.
S.TRANSL: 一邊呼叫著狗的同時，勇敢的Talum不知不覺到了家。
While continuing to call the dog, Talum the Brave arrived home.

S.FORM: ai sadu saia tu uka asu kinkikinuz saicia uka amin makuslavi saicia minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 他看到狗沒有跟著他，也沒有跟著回來。
His dog did not follow him, and did not come back either.

S.FORM: antalam a pingaz mas uvaaz tu uka.
S.TRANSL: 老婆和小孩回答：「沒有。」
His wife and children answered: ‘NO.’

S.FORM: at miliskin maz a Talum mamangan tu ai na mavia tu nii tu kinkinuz a asu a.
S.TRANSL: 然後Talum就在想：「欸，奇怪，怎麼沒有跟來呢？」
Then Talum the brave was considering why the dog did not come after?

S.FORM: miliskin a saia tu masa na mudaan hai ta’aza ang saia tu luluang ang maz a asu at.
S.TRANSL: 他想起來，當他要走的時候還聽到那個狗一直汪汪叫。
He remembered that he had heard the dog barking when he was leaving.

S.FORM: cinsuu saia mapunastu mas ’inama tu cici cia.
S.TRANSL: 他立刻把他背的獵物放下。
He put down the meat he had been carrying on his back.

S.FORM: macinsuu musuhis kusia daidingian saicia mapuasu kikilim tu libus cia tu.
S.TRANSL: 他立刻回頭，回到他所狗獵的森林一直找尋。
He went back to the forest where he had gone dog hunting right away and kept looking for the dog.

S.FORM: malala’la mas asu cia tu na taudanivan a asu a na kilim mas isaicia tu asu cia.
S.TRANSL: 一直呼喚，要把狗喚回，要去尋找他的狗
He kept yelling, because he wanted his dog back. He was going to look for his dog.

S.FORM: at tuza tu.
S.TRANSL: 欸，真是的！
Oh, come on!

S.FORM: maz a Tulum eh Talum mamangan hai mapunastu mas isaicia tu ’inama tu davaz at tu cici at.
S.TRANSL: 那個勇敢的Talum把所背的袋子和肉放下來。
Talum the Brave put down his net bag and the meat.

S.FORM: macinsuu musuhis kansanavan kanlabian islabainan kusia daidingian saicia hahanup tu ludum cia malala’la mas asu cia taudadaniv mas asu hai.
S.TRANSL: 立刻馬上回頭，連夜趕到他的獵場，一直叫那隻狗。
He turned back right away, went back through the night to the hunting ground and kept calling the dog.

S.FORM: at isdumduman saia isia ludum cia malala’la hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後天變黑了他還在山上叫。
He kept calling in the mountain despite that the sky turned dark.

S.FORM: mikui nii a saia mahtu musuhis mais nii tu inkaduan a maz a asu at.
S.TRANSL: 如果沒找到那隻狗他就不回去。
However, he could not go back if the dog was not found.

S.FORM: istus’a.
S.TRANSL: 天亮了。
The day broke.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia lukis malala’la maz a Talum mamangan a taudadaniv mas isaicia tu asu tas tu hanian taudadaniv kikilim hai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 勇敢的Talum爬上樹一直叫喚他的狗，邊喊邊找了一整天，但還是沒有狗回來
Talum the Brave got on the tree, keeping calling and looking for his dog a whole day. However, no dog came.

S.FORM: tailciun tu hanian labian hanian taudadaniv mas asu uka minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 三天三夜了，他找的那隻狗沒有回來。
Three days passed, the dog that he had been looking for did not come back.

S.FORM: nii tu maun nii tu masabah malala’la taudadaniv mas asu cia hai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 不吃不睡一直叫，一直呼喊那隻狗，但是狗還是沒有回來。
He kept calling, without eating and sleeping. Yet the dog did not come back.

S.FORM: at maz a Talum mamangan a hai makuang is’aang masmuav tu masalpu mas asu cia kadimanun saicia tu asu.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個Talum很傷心，非常想念那隻狗，他最珍惜的狗
Talum the Brave was so sad. He missed the dog very much, the dog he treasured the most.

S.FORM: pahasia mala’la saia miliskin saia tu na mikua mais uk in a asu a isaicia mamangan a hai na uk in mahtu mintangas saicia mais hanup.
S.TRANSL: 但是他邊叫邊想：「如果沒有他的勇敢的狗的話要怎麼辦呢？打獵的時候就沒有狗可以幫助他了。」
However, he kept calling and considering what if there is not his brave dog? He would get no help when going hunting.

S.FORM: at idadaza saia lukis cia cinhanimulmul makuang a is’aang miliskin tu na mikua.
S.TRANSL: 他在樹上突然難過、傷心起來，想著要怎麼辦。
In the tree he became very sad of a sudden, wondering what should he do.

S.FORM: nii tu haiaphaiap tu ais talciun in hangsia.
S.TRANSL: 不知不覺，原來已經三天了。
Three days passed unconsciously.

S.FORM: masauhzang mihdi ukaan in a maz a lutbu mas hatba tamasaz.
S.TRANSL: 很餓很辛苦，身體已經沒有體力沒有力量了。
He was hungry and hard and had no power.

S.FORM: isian saia lukis cia lapakvu isuka s is’aang.
S.TRANSL: 他在樹上，癱軟一倒，斷氣了。
He was weak on the tree, and then he died.

S.FORM: tailciun in hai maz a isaicia maluspingaz at kilim tu us in a Talum a mamangan a kikilim mas asu talciun in uka musuhis kulumah.
S.TRANSL: 過了三天他的老婆找說「勇敢的Talum在哪裡了？一直找那個狗，三天了還沒回家。」
After three days passed, his wife wondered where Talum the Brave was, why not come back home after looking for dog for three days.

S.FORM: tuza tu aiza tais’an a makilavi mai’aupasia una’uun mas Talum cia hahanup tu ludum.
S.TRANSL: 果然真的有親戚緊跟著朝著Talum常常去的打獵的山。
Then indeed the cousins went to the mountain where Talum usually goes to.

S.FORM: uka uka amin antatalam uka antatalam.
S.TRANSL: 都沒回應。
No answers thought.

S.FORM: mananakis a naia kudadaza sia ludum samangha naia sadu aiza isia lukis cia manduduut manduduut.
S.TRANSL: 一直往上走爬到山上，抬頭望上看有什麼在樹上嘟嘟叫。
They went uphill. They looked up, seeing something kept crying ‘duduut’ in the tree.

S.FORM: at cinmangha naia sadu tu maz bi s isia lukia a manduduut a dau.
S.TRANSL: 他們再望上看，到底是什麼在樹上一直嘟嘟叫。
Then they looked upward and wondered what was crying ‘Duduut’.

S.FORM: ai sadu tu aiza tas hazam hazam daingaz isia lukis cia lukis tu siahi tu panga ka manduduut malala’la malala’la duduut.
S.TRANSL: 哎！看到有一隻鳥，很大的鳥在樹枝上就一直嘟嘟叫。
Oh! They saw a big bird kept crying ‘DUDUUT’ on the branch.

S.FORM: duut duut.
S.TRANSL: 嘟嘟。
Duut duut.

S.FORM: amuhangsia sadu naia at cinhaiap naia tu a maz a saia hai sia s Talum mamangan tu min‘uni hangsia mas hazam.
S.TRANSL: 原來如此，他們看見，然後他們就知道那個他原來就是勇敢的Talum變成鳥了。
In fact, they saw, and all of a sudden the knew that was a bird Talum the Brave had become.

S.FORM: kaz in ka min‘uni laupaka dau tu sia manduduut tu hazam.
S.TRANSL: 就變成了現在一直嘟嘟叫的鳥。
He just became this bird that was crying ‘Duduut'.

S.FORM: kaupa cia.
S.TRANSL: 結束。
The end.
